matches.description_1: The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE and the UE had set the CAG bit to 'CAG supported' in the 5GMM capability IE of the REGISTRATION REQUEST message Type: decision Properties: {'condition': "The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE and the UE had set the CAG bit to 'CAG supported' in the 5GMM capability IE of the REGISTRATION REQUEST message", 'outcomes': [{'outcome': "UE replaces the 'CAG information list' stored in the UE with the received CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE when received in the HPLMN or EHPLMN, replaces the serving VPLMN's entry of the 'CAG information list' stored in the UE with the serving VPLMN's entry of the received CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE when the UE receives the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE in a serving PLMN other than the HPLMN or EHPLMN, or removes the serving VPLMN's entry of the 'CAG information list' stored in the UE when the UE receives the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE in a serving PLMN other than the HPLMN or EHPLMN and the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE does not contain the serving VPLMN's entry", 'next_step': '10'}, {'outcome': "The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message does not contain the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE and the UE had not set the CAG bit to 'CAG supported' in the 5GMM capability IE of the REGISTRATION REQUEST message", 'next_step': '10'}]}
matches.description_2: If the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE and the UE had set the CAG bit to "CAG supported" in the 5GMM capability IE of the REGISTRATION REQUEST message, the UE shall replace the "CAG information list" stored in the UE with the received CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE when received in the HPLMN or EHPLMN. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'UE'}

matches.description_1: The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the Operator-defined access category definitions IE, the Extended emergency number list IE ,the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE Type: decision Properties: {'condition': 'The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the Operator-defined access category definitions IE, the Extended emergency number list IE ,the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE', 'outcomes': [{'outcome': "UE returns a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF to acknowledge reception of the operator-defined access category definitions, the extended local emergency numbers list or the 'CAG information list'", 'next_step': '12'}, {'outcome': 'The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message does not contain the Operator-defined access category definitions IE, the Extended emergency number list IE ,the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE', 'next_step': '11'}]}
matches.description_2: If the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the Operator-defined access category definitions IE, the Extended emergency number list IE ,the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE, the UE shall return a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF to acknowledge reception of the operator-defined access category definitions, the extended local emergency numbers list or the "CAG information list". Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'UE', 'messages': ['REGISTRATION COMPLETE']}

matches.description_1: The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE Type: decision Properties: {'condition': 'The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE', 'outcomes': [{'outcome': 'UE returns a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF to acknowledge reception of the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE', 'next_step': '12'}, {'outcome': 'The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message does not contain the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE', 'next_step': 'end'}]}
matches.description_2: If the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE, the UE shall return a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF to acknowledge reception of the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'UE', 'messages': ['REGISTRATION COMPLETE']}

UE sends REGISTRATION COMPLETE to AMF Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'UE', 'messages': ['REGISTRATION COMPLETE']}
UE takes actions based on 5GMM cause value Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'UE'}

Abnormal Cases in the UE - T3510 timeout Type: decision Properties: {'entity': 'UE', 'condition': 'Timer T3510 expires', 'outcomes': [{'outcome': 'Abort the registration procedure for initial registration and the NAS signalling connection, if any, shall be released locally', 'next_step': '13'}]}

Retry or PLMN Selection Type: decision Properties: {'entity': 'UE', 'condition': 'Registration attempt counter < 5', 'outcomes': [{'outcome': 'Start T3511 and enter 5GMM-DEREGISTERED.ATTEMPTING-REGISTRATION', 'next_step': 'end_failure'}, {'outcome': 'Registration attempt counter = 5', 'next_step': '14'}]}

PLMN Selection Type: decision Properties: {'entity': 'UE', 'condition': 'Value of T3502 as indicated by the network is not zero', 'outcomes': [{'outcome': 'Start timer T3502 and set 5GS update status to 5U2 NOT UPDATED', 'next_step': 'end_failure'}, {'outcome': 'Value of T3502 as indicated by the network is zero', 'next_step': 'end_failure'}]}
Procedure ends successfully Type: end Properties: {}
Procedure ends with failure Type: end Properties: {}
UE sends REGISTRATION REQUEST to AMF Type: process Properties: {'state_before': '5GMM-DEREGISTERED', 'entity': 'UE', 'messages': ['REGISTRATION REQUEST']}

Network initiates 5GMM common procedures Type: decision Properties: {'entity': 'AMF', 'condition': 'Network determines if common procedures are needed based on REGISTRATION REQUEST', 'outcomes': [{'outcome': 'Initiate Identification, Authentication, and Security procedures', 'next_step': '4'}, {'outcome': 'Skip Authentication and proceed to Security Mode Control (for emergency registration with unauthenticated SUCIs)', 'next_step': '4'}, {'outcome': 'Proceed without initiating common procedures', 'next_step': '4'}]}

REGISTRATION COMPLETE (Conditional) Type: decision Properties: {'entity': 'UE', 'condition': 'Certain IEs are included in the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message', 'outcomes': [{'outcome': 'Send REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF', 'next_step': '8'}, {'outcome': 'Do not send REGISTRATION COMPLETE message', 'next_step': 'end_success'}]}
UE takes actions based on 5GMM cause value Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'UE'}

Abnormal Cases in the UE - T3510 timeout Type: decision Properties: {'entity': 'UE', 'condition': 'Timer T3510 expires', 'outcomes': [{'outcome': 'Abort the registration procedure for initial registration and the NAS signalling connection, if any, shall be released locally', 'next_step': '13'}]}

Retry or PLMN Selection Type: decision Properties: {'entity': 'UE', 'condition': 'Registration attempt counter < 5', 'outcomes': [{'outcome': 'Start T3511 and enter 5GMM-DEREGISTERED.ATTEMPTING-REGISTRATION', 'next_step': 'end_failure'}, {'outcome': 'Registration attempt counter = 5', 'next_step': '14'}]}

PLMN Selection Type: decision Properties: {'entity': 'UE', 'condition': 'Value of T3502 as indicated by the network is not zero', 'outcomes': [{'outcome': 'Start timer T3502 and set 5GS update status to 5U2 NOT UPDATED', 'next_step': 'end_failure'}, {'outcome': 'Value of T3502 as indicated by the network is zero', 'next_step': 'end_failure'}]}

If a 5G-GUTI or the SOR transparent container IE is included in the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message, the AMF shall start timer T3550 and enter state 5GMM-COMMON-PROCEDURE-INITIATED. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'AMF', 'timers': ['T3550 (start)']}
Procedure ends with failure Type: end Properties: {}

Initial registration request is accepted by the network Type: decision Properties: {'condition': 'Initial registration request is accepted by the network', 'outcomes': [{'outcome': 'AMF sends REGISTRATION ACCEPT', 'next_step': '4'}, {'outcome': 'Initial registration request cannot be accepted by the network', 'next_step': '13'}]}
AMF starts timer T3550 Type: timer Properties: {'action': 'start', 'name': 'T3550', 'state_change': '5GMM-COMMON-PROCEDURE-INITIATED', 'entity': 'AMF'}

The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the Network slicing indication IE with the Network slicing subscription change indication set to 'Network slicing subscription changed', a Configured NSSAI IE with a new configured NSSAI, an NSSRG information IE with a new NSSRG information, an Alternative NSSAI IE with a new alternative NSSAI, an S-NSSAI location validity information in the Registration accept type 6 IE container IE with a new S-NSSAI location validity information, an S-NSSAI time validity information IE with a new S-NSSAI time validity information, or an On-demand NSSAI IE with a new on-demand NSSAI or an updated slice deregistration inactivity timer value Type: decision Properties: {'condition': "The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the Network slicing indication IE with the Network slicing subscription change indication set to 'Network slicing subscription changed', a Configured NSSAI IE with a new configured NSSAI, an NSSRG information IE with a new NSSRG information, an Alternative NSSAI IE with a new alternative NSSAI, an S-NSSAI location validity information in the Registration accept type 6 IE container IE with a new S-NSSAI location validity information, an S-NSSAI time validity information IE with a new S-NSSAI time validity information, or an On-demand NSSAI IE with a new on-demand NSSAI or an updated slice deregistration inactivity timer value", 'outcomes': [{'outcome': 'UE returns a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF to acknowledge the successful update of the network slicing information', 'next_step': '12'}, {'outcome': "The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message does not contain the Network slicing indication IE with the Network slicing subscription change indication set to 'Network slicing subscription changed', a Configured NSSAI IE with a new configured NSSAI, an NSSRG information IE with a new NSSRG information, an Alternative NSSAI IE with a new alternative NSSAI, an S-NSSAI location validity information in the Registration accept type 6 IE container IE with a new S-NSSAI location validity information, an S-NSSAI time validity information IE with a new S-NSSAI time validity information, or an On-demand NSSAI IE with a new on-demand NSSAI or an updated slice deregistration inactivity timer value", 'next_step': '9'}]}
Procedure ends Type: end Properties: {}

5G-GUTI or the SOR transparent container IE is included in the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message Type: decision Properties: {'condition': '5G-GUTI or the SOR transparent container IE is included in the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message', 'outcomes': [{'outcome': 'AMF starts timer T3550 and enters state 5GMM-COMMON-PROCEDURE-INITIATED', 'next_step': '6'}, {'outcome': 'No 5G-GUTI or the SOR transparent container IE', 'next_step': '7'}]}
AMF starts timer T3550 Type: timer Properties: {'action': 'start', 'name': 'T3550', 'state_change': '5GMM-COMMON-PROCEDURE-INITIATED', 'entity': 'AMF'}

The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the Network slicing indication IE with the Network slicing subscription change indication set to 'Network slicing subscription changed', a Configured NSSAI IE with a new configured NSSAI, an NSSRG information IE with a new NSSRG information, an Alternative NSSAI IE with a new alternative NSSAI, an S-NSSAI location validity information in the Registration accept type 6 IE container IE with a new S-NSSAI location validity information, an S-NSSAI time validity information IE with a new S-NSSAI time validity information, or an On-demand NSSAI IE with a new on-demand NSSAI or an updated slice deregistration inactivity timer value Type: decision Properties: {'condition': "The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the Network slicing indication IE with The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE and the UE had set the CAG bit to 'CAG supported' in the 5GMM capability IE of the REGISTRATION REQUEST message Type: decision Properties: {'condition': "The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE and the UE had set the CAG bit to 'CAG supported' in the 5GMM capability IE of the REGISTRATION REQUEST message", 'outcomes': [{'outcome': "UE replaces the 'CAG information list' stored in the UE with the received CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE when received in the HPLMN or EHPLMN, replaces the serving VPLMN's entry of the 'CAG information list' stored in the UE with the serving VPLMN's entry of the received CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE when the UE receives the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE in a serving PLMN other than the HPLMN or EHPLMN, or removes the serving VPLMN's entry of the 'CAG information list' stored in the UE when the UE receives the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE in a serving PLMN other than the HPLMN or EHPLMN and the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE does not contain the serving VPLMN's entry", 'next_step': '10'}, {'outcome': "The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message does not contain the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE and the UE had not set the CAG bit to 'CAG supported' in the 5GMM capability IE of the REGISTRATION REQUEST message", 'next_step': '10'}]}

The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the Operator-defined access category definitions IE, the Extended emergency number list IE ,the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE Type: decision Properties: {'condition': 'The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the Operator-defined access category definitions IE, the Extended emergency number list IE ,the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE', 'outcomes': [{'outcome': "UE returns a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF to acknowledge reception of the operator-defined access category definitions, the extended local emergency numbers list or the 'CAG information list'", 'next_step': '12'}, {'outcome': 'The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message does not contain the Operator-defined access category definitions IE, the Extended emergency number list IE ,the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE', 'next_step': '11'}]}

The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE Type: decision Properties: {'condition': 'The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE', 'outcomes': [{'outcome': 'UE returns a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF to acknowledge reception of the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE', 'next_step': '12'}, {'outcome': 'The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message does not contain the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE', 'next_step': 'end'}]}
UE stops timer T3502, if it is running Type: process Properties: {'action': 'stop', 'name': 'T3502', 'entity': 'UE'}
UE stops timer T3511, if it is running Type: process Properties: {'action': 'stop', 'name': 'T3511', 'entity': 'UE'}

If the SUCI is included in the 5GS mobile identity IE and the timer T3519 is not running, the UE shall start timer T3519 and store the value of the SUCI sent in the REGISTRATION REQUEST message. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'UE'}

The network may initiate 5GMM common procedures, e.g. the identification, authentication and security procedures during the registration procedure, depending on the information received in the REGISTRATION REQUEST message. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'AMF'}
The AMF shall assign and include a TAI list as a registration area the UE is registered to in the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'AMF'}
The UE, upon receiving a REGISTRATION ACCEPT message, shall delete its old TAI list and store the received TAI list. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'UE'}

If a 5G-GUTI or the SOR transparent container IE is included in the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message, the AMF shall start timer T3550 and enter state 5GMM-COMMON-PROCEDURE-INITIATED. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'AMF', 'state_change': '5GMM-COMMON-PROCEDURE-INITIATED'}

If the Operator-defined access category definitions IE, the Extended emergency number list IE, the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE are included in the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message, the AMF shall start timer T3550 and enter state 5GMM-COMMON-PROCEDURE-INITIATED. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'AMF', 'state_change': '5GMM-COMMON-PROCEDURE-INITIATED'}

If the UE has set the RCMAP bit to "Sending of REGISTRATION COMPLETE message for negotiated PEIPS assistance information supported" in the 5GMM capability IE of the REGISTRATION REQUEST message and if the Negotiated PEIPS assistance information IE is included in the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message, the AMF shall start timer T3550 and enter state 5GMM-COMMON-PROCEDURE-INITIATED. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'AMF', 'state_change': '5GMM-COMMON-PROCEDURE-INITIATED'}

If the UE is not in NB-N1 mode and the UE has set the RACS bit to "RACS supported" in the 5GMM Capability IE of the REGISTRATION REQUEST message, the AMF may include either a UE radio capability ID IE or a UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE in the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message. If the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE is included in the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message, the AMF shall start timer T3550 and enter state 5GMM-COMMON-PROCEDURE-INITIATED. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'AMF', 'state_change': '5GMM-COMMON-PROCEDURE-INITIATED'}

If the UE has set the RCMAN bit to "Sending of REGISTRATION COMPLETE message for NSAG information supported" in the 5GMM capability IE of the REGISTRATION REQUEST message and if REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the NSAG information IE, the UE shall return REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF to acknowledge the reception of the NSAG information IE. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'UE', 'messages': ['REGISTRATION COMPLETE']}

If the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE and the UE had set the CAG bit to "CAG supported" in the 5GMM capability IE of the REGISTRATION REQUEST message, the UE shall replace the "CAG information list" stored in the UE with the received CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE when received in the HPLMN or EHPLMN. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'UE'}

If the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the Operator-defined access category definitions IE, the Extended emergency number list IE ,the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE, the UE shall return a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF to acknowledge reception of the operator-defined access category definitions, the extended local emergency numbers list or the "CAG information list". Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'UE', 'messages': ['REGISTRATION COMPLETE']}

If the UE has set the RCMAP bit to "Sending of REGISTRATION COMPLETE message for negotiated PEIPS parameters supported" in the 5GMM capability IE of the REGISTRATION REQUEST message and if REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the Negotiated PEIPS assistance information IE, the UE shall return REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF to acknowledge the reception of the Negotiated PEIPS assistance information IE. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'UE', 'messages': ['REGISTRATION COMPLETE']}

If the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE, the UE shall return a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF to acknowledge reception of the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'UE', 'messages': ['REGISTRATION COMPLETE']}
